violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Paint on the wall and ceiling in the food prep area is chipping.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Boxes of lettuce on the floor of the walk in cooler.
